notes: Dark rarities grid (no job) — malice, epic, exo, revans, regalia, vintage primal, bahamut coda, xeno, astral, illustrious MH. Decoded via remove-and-diff (Coda/Agastia/Cortana/Hamartia screenshots): the panel display drops decimals at >=100% (Might true 117.4, Ω 180.95, HP 136.55 all display floored) — the validator's integer-floor rule covers it. Awakenings are real contributors: Agastia Attack lv20 = Might +35 flat + EX Might +10 (Revans table), Hamartia 'Special' lv10 = Might +20 / HP +20 flat (Exo Might/HP column; the other column is all main-only). Coda = Concrio 35/21 at SL20 + Vita 2%/matching character (5 here: MC+Zeta human, Sariel primal, Koku+Orologia other; Wamdus harvin excluded) — normal-frame flat. Cortana SL1 (Tyranny 6.0 + Trium 1.2 skill_level field), Advocatus SL15 (True Phantom 23; its HP half provably absent from the panel). E. ATK 15 OMITTED: survives removal of Coda/Agastia/Cortana/Hamartia — source among Zosimos/Majestas/Scales/Spine/Advocatus/Claws, needs one more removal (suggest Scales of Dominion, then Claws of Terror). TA attribution note: the game kept TA 5.64 when Cortana was removed, so Trium III may be DA-only at SL1 with another TA source hiding — values match either way.
